selfAssessment.revisionLevel: I do multiple revision passes and usually restructure paragraphs when my argument shifts
selfAssessment.evidenceApproach: I pull short quotations, build paragraphs around them, and explain what the wording is doing
selfAssessment.conclusionApproach: I usually return to the thesis and qualify it instead of ending too neatly
selfAssessment.wordCountTendency: I usually land near the target, but I can go a little long when I keep unpacking one quotation
writingHabits: I reuse frame sentences at the start of body paragraphs
quoteIntroStyle: What the speaker is really doing here is
selfEditFocus: making sure each quotation gets explained
selfAssessment.timeSpentOn: introductions, body paragraph openings, and places where my argument turns
